title: How is it possible to live in world...

messages.content:
**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

I am Tarsus (The Apostle), grounding my answers strictly in the scripture of truth and the curated teachings of Daniel Miles. How can I assist you in dividing the word of truth today?

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
How is it possible to live in world framed by law?

**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

To live in a world framed by law, one must first discern the nature of that frame. The world, in its cOLD mode, often operates under a system of *gnosis*, a knowledge associated with law, duality, and a "dark glass" reflection of reality [^4][^6]. This is akin to the early narratives of Mt & Mk, where there is NO mention of grace, and a risen Jesus still "UPBRAIDED" and "DAMNED" non-believers, portraying a mode still cOLD→LukeWarm→Hot [^1][^11]. Why? Because in this "Jesus twain mode," there were still 2Sons (Son of God & Son of man) and 2Voices (live & judgment also), reflecting both grace & law, being both nice & nasty after [^2]. This legal framework, whether religious or governmental, thrives on control and the illusion of separation, often leading to contention and a "wretched" state [^4].

However, the transition to "Christ mode" marks the end of the law, as noted from Romans forward, where there is NO more mention of Son of man, ONLY Son of God [^2]. If any man is "in Christ" (of through our Lord Jesus→Christ), he is then a new creature whereby all things are new (only), not still old & new as in Jesus twain mode; for "in Christ" (is end of law) old things (aka laws) have passed away [^3]. This is where *epignosis* comes into play, strongly associated with charity, which "never faileth" and is unifying, perfect, and not puffed up [^5]. Unlike *gnosis*, which is a twisted reflection, *epignosis* brings clarity and direct vision, allowing us to see clearly through the "BS or dung as Paul called law" [^4].

Therefore, living in a law-framed world from a grace perspective means embracing this *epignosis*—an "innerstanding that passes peace" [^7]. It is not that peace is irrelevant, but that innerstanding precedes and facilitates peace, rather than the other way around. The "shield of faith" in this context is not a law-based faith that leads to a sad end, but an upgraded grace faith that is "much more effective than any law force shield" [^8]. This shield is to be taken "above (epi) all" [^9], signifying a pure grace force that transcends defensive or offensive sides. In this true grace, there is "no left," for God will never leave thee nor forsake thee, ensuring no one is left behind [^10]. This awareness allows one to maintain "Exceeding gladness," confirming that *epignosis* is self-control, where one decides how to feel, not "them" [^12].

- [Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity](/pages/gnosis_vs_epignosis_in_charity)
- [faith publishing](/pages/faith_publishing)
- [RESURRECTION DAY PROBLEM WITH RISEN JESUS IN MARK !6](/pages/resurrection_day_problem_with_risen_jesus_in_mark_6)

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**

1.title: Biblical MYSTERY things to notice, ponder, discuss
1.snippet: It makes Mt & Mk as still cOLD mode of cOLD→LukeWarm→Hot.

2.title: Biblical MYSTERY things to notice, ponder, discuss
2.snippet: So it's why there is NO more mention of Son of man, ONLY Son of God in Romans forward

3.title: Biblical MYSTERY things to notice, ponder, discuss
3.snippet: if any man is 'in Christ' (of through our Lord Jesus→Christ = end of the law: Rom 10:4), he's then a new creature whereby all things are new (only), not still old & new as in Jesus twain mode; For 'in Christ' (is end of law) old things (aka laws) have passed away.

4.title: Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity
4.snippet: gnosis associated with law - diabolical wisdom

5.title: Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity
5.snippet: Charity is strongly associated with epignosis: - never faileth (replaces gnosis) shall vanish (katargeo) - is unifying, perfect, that which Was in part is done away

6.title: Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity
6.snippet: dark glass as a middle man, as a translucid mirror, we can see trough a reverse (twisted) reflected image

8.title: faith publishing
8.snippet: Shield of faith of grace much more effective than any law force shield

9.title: faith publishing
9.snippet: this 'shield of faith' that is 'able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked' seems like the only piece of such armour that is to be taken (analambano) 'above (epi) all'

10.title: Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity
10.snippet: in grace there is no left, since true God will never leave thee nor forsake thee, so no one left behind.

11.title: RESURRECTION DAY PROBLEM WITH RISEN JESUS IN MARK !6
11.snippet: Yet in 16: 14-16 when Jesus appeared to the eleven he still 'UPBRAIDED' and still 'DAMNED' [katkrino: condemned] non-believers.

12.title: Gnosis vs Epignosis in Charity
12.snippet: we can maintain the true grace emotion Exceeding gladness, which confirms that epignosis is self control, I decide how to feel, not hem decide how I feel.
